_comment: Map configurations. Each key must match the map 'id'. 'spawnConfig' must match a key in spawns.json. 'collisionPath' points to a pre-baked collision JSON under /public. Set to null for procedurally generated collision. 'gltfPath' is the client-side visual model under /public; null means a flat plane is generated at runtime.

default.name: Flatlands
default.description: An open flat arena. The default placeholder map with no obstacles.

arena.name: Arena
arena.description: A compact indoor arena with raised platforms and cover.
